_meta.note: Stats recomputed from 1y live price history (fixed weights). Weights are curated — run build-portfolios.mjs to fully reoptimise.

growth.name: Max Growth
growth.description: Targets the highest expected return using a max-Sharpe allocation across high-quality growth equities from the Aurum universe. Weighted toward technology, health care innovation, and global growth leaders.

shield.name: Min Risk
shield.description: Targets the minimum-variance point on the efficient frontier using defensive equities across utilities, consumer staples, and health care. Lower expected return but substantially smaller drawdowns.

balanced.name: Balanced Core
balanced.tagline: Steady growth with built-in downside protection
balanced.description: Blends high-quality growth and defensive holdings across all major sectors. A tighter sector cap limits concentration, making this a stable all-weather allocation for investors who want market participation without high volatility.

accessible.name: Starter Growth
accessible.description: Targets solid risk-adjusted returns using growth stocks priced under $150 per share. Full position count is achievable at $1K, making this the most accessible way to hold a diversified growth portfolio across tech, fintech, and consumer sectors.

tech-ai.name: Tech & AI
tech-ai.tagline: Concentrated exposure to technology and AI leadership
tech-ai.description: Concentrated across Information Technology and Communication Services, this portfolio targets the highest Sharpe names in semiconductors, cloud, software, and AI infrastructure. Higher volatility in exchange for maximum sector-level growth potential.

healthcare.name: Healthcare & Biotech
healthcare.tagline: Defensive growth anchored in health care innovation
healthcare.description: Spans pharma, biotech, and medical devices across global leaders. Benefits from aging demographics and drug innovation cycles while maintaining lower correlation to broad market swings than pure growth portfolios.

energy-infra.name: Energy & Infrastructure
energy-infra.tagline: Real assets, capital flows, essential services
energy-infra.description: Combines energy producers, utilities, and industrial operators — sectors that generate stable cash flows from physical assets. Lower correlation to tech-driven market moves; benefits from infrastructure spend and energy transition capex.

consumer.name: Consumer Blend
consumer.description: Holds the world's strongest consumer brands across discretionary and staples — combining defensive dividend payers with higher-growth retail and food-service names. Relatively low volatility for a growth-leaning allocation.

dividend.name: Dividend Income
dividend.description: Concentrates on companies with consistent and substantial dividend histories across telecoms, energy, utilities, and consumer staples. Prioritises income generation and capital preservation over appreciation — suited for lower-risk, income-oriented investors.

global-div.name: Global Diversified
global-div.tagline: Broad international exposure beyond US markets
global-div.description: Over 85% allocated outside the United States across European, Asia-Pacific, and Emerging Market leaders. Provides currency diversification and exposure to growth cycles uncorrelated with US equity markets. Best for investors seeking to reduce US home bias.

quality.name: Quality Growth
quality.tagline: Mega-cap compounders with durable competitive moats
quality.description: Restricts the universe to mega-cap companies with sustained earnings growth, dominant market positions, and strong balance sheets. A tighter sector cap (20%) prevents any single industry from dominating, making this the most balanced of the growth-oriented strategies.

value.name: Deep Value
value.tagline: Undervalued positions with earnings-backed recovery potential
value.description: Targets sectors and companies trading at relative valuation discounts — financials, energy, materials, and utilities — where cash generation is high but market sentiment has suppressed prices. Lower expected return but strong downside resilience.
